role: This directory aggregates metadata and indexing records for a domain source folder within the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Collectively, the components in this directory define the structural metadata, file indexing provenance, and semantic entry for a TypeScript source file, ensuring content integrity, dependency tracking, and pipeline stage logging.

children.role: Defines the structural metadata and indexing provenance for a domain source folder within the ArchSpine mirror system.
